raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 42,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad skaitija Mohsus/ it-
tin ka tas KUNGS tam bij pa-
wehlejis/ wiſſus Pirmdsintus
starp Israëta Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 43,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Pirmdsinti no
Wihrn-Kahrtas/ pehz to Wahrd-
do Pulkũ/ weenu Mehnesi un
pahri/ ittin ka tee skaititi tappe/
bija diwidesinitis divi tuhkſtoſchi/
diwisimts/ feptindeſinitis un
trihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 44,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS runna-
ja us Mohsu/ fazzidams:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 45,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Neimn tohs Lewitus/wif-
fu Israëta Behrnu Pirmdsinto
Weetã/ un to Lewitu Lohpus/
winzu Lohpu Weetã; Jo teem
Lewiteem buhs man peederreht.
Es eſmu tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet par teem diwitim-
teem un feptindeſinitis trim/ kaim
buhs iſpirkteem tapt/ kas pahri
irr pahr teem Lewiteem no teem
Israëta Behrnu Pirmdsinteeem/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buhs tew par ikweenu
: Galwu peežus ſudraba Sihke-
tus ſeimt/pehz tahs fwehtas Wee-
tas Sihkeli/ weens Sihkelis irr
diwidesmits Geera.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tew buhs to Naudu
Aäronam/ un winna Dehleein
doht/ to Iſpirkto Naudu/ kas
winzu Starpã pahrt irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nehme Mohsus to
Iſpirkschanas-Naudu no teem/
kas pahri bija pahr to Lewitu
Iſpirkteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "No teem Israëta Behrnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Mohsus dewe to Js-
pirkto Nandu Aäronam/ un
winna Dehleem/ pehz ta KUN-
GA Wahrdũ/ittin ka tasKUNGS
Mohsum bij pawehlejis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pirmdsinteeem nehme wiſsch t
Naudu/tuhkſtoſchnis trihsfintis/
fechdefinitis un peez Sihketus/
pehz tahs fwehtas Weetas Sih-
keli.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
Deewa Lifkums to Lewito Ammata deht pe-
swehtas Weetas/ un kad tas Lehgeris zel-
tahs: 2. Teem Kaätitereem buhs tah-
wiſſiwehtakas Leetas kad tahs apſegtas u-
eetihtas/ no Aärona un winna Dehleein-
xent un nest: 5. Teem Gersonitereem buh-
tahs Telts Gardines un Dekkus nest: 25
Teem Merara Dehleem buhs tahs Aischauj-
mus/ Etabbus un Kahjas nest: 29. Wi-
Lewitu Pulks irr 8580: 46.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-
naja us Mohsu/ un u-
Aäronu/ fazzidams:
2. Nemm to Kaäta Dehl-
Pulku/ no Lewja Dehlu Wid-
dus/ pehz fawahni Sainehin-
pehz fatwo Tehwu Namma.
3. Trihsdefinitis Gaddus wez-
zus un pahri/ lihds peež-defmitau-
Gaddam/ wiſſus/ kas Karxã ee-
warr/ ka tee darra to Darbu Sa-
eeschanas Telti.
4. Schislaid irr to Kaäta Deh-
lu Darbs Sa-eeschanas Telti-
kas to fwehtu * Leetu Swehtib-
irr.
* Prohti ſcheit to Derribas Schkirſtu, to Ga-
du ar rahm fwehtam Maiſehm, to Lukuri,
Kwehpja-Altari, tahs fwehtas Weetas Rihku-
ir to Dedsamu-Uppuzu-Altari.
5. Kad tas Lehgeris zeltahe-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
